testcase.name: test_create_agent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_company_admin_full.py:116: in test_create_agent assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create agent failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create agent failed: {"message":"Validation failed","details":[{"field":"body -> name","message":"Field required","type":"missing"},{"field":"body -> username","message":"Field required","type":"missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_agent
test_get_agent_detail
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_company_admin_full.py:181: in test_get_agent_detail assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get agent detail failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get agent detail failed: {"detail":"Agent non trouvé"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
